form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 400m at Bulli. This looks too tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slipped on the mat shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 6th on April 16 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Zipping Lowens beaten 7 lengths (30.74) in a Grade 5. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by a nose over 622m at this track in a handy 36.42, beating Miss Penelope. Key chance again.
